outcome.adjudication_note: Oracle is impl-coupled to the host-layer .kitsoki-owner sentinel. GLM closes the destructive-data-loss bug via the alternate path-keying approach (world.session_id -> .worktrees/bf-<ticket>-<uuid>), the per-session keying the real fix's own comment deferred as a future enhancement. GLM's own orchestrator repro test passes; go build ./... green; judge accepted 0.87. Partial (not solved): lacks the host-layer defense-in-depth the oracle asserts, so a non-idle-room caller racing the same path is unguarded.

notes: oracle TestRepro_ConcurrentSessionsShareCheckout_DestroysWIP: rc=1; cost from native meta.cost_usd
